option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>org.example</groupId> <artifactId>Echiquier</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>23</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>23</maven.compiler.target> <maven.compiler.release>23</maven.compiler.release> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Apache Batik for SVG rasterization --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.xmlgraphics</groupId> <artifactId>batik-transcoder</artifactId> <version>1.16</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.xmlgraphics</groupId> <artifactId>batik-codec</artifactId> <version>1.16</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.5.0</version> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> <configuration> <transformers> <transformer implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ManifestResourceTransformer"> <mainClass>org.Main</mainClass> </transformer> </transformers> <finalName>Echiquier-all</finalName> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>org.example</groupId> <artifactId>Echiquier</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>23</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>23</maven.compiler.target> <maven.compiler.release>23</maven.compiler.release> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- JUnit 5 for unit testing --> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId> <version>5.10.2</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Apache Batik for SVG rasterization --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.xmlgraphics</groupId> <artifactId>batik-transcoder</artifactId> <version>1.16</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.xmlgraphics</groupId> <artifactId>batik-codec</artifactId> <version>1.16</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.5.0</version> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> <configuration> <transformers> <transformer implementation="org.apache.maven.plugins.shade.resource.ManifestResourceTransformer"> <mainClass>org.Main</mainClass> </transformer> </transformers> <finalName>Echiquier-all</finalName> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
